name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools churn out visually bland, template-heavy slides that undermine professional credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving teams an AI assistant that enhances storytelling and design without overriding editorial judgment. The result is presentations that look intentional rather than machine-generated.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with a distinctive visual identity
Creating client-facing sales presentations that stand out from templated decks
Producing internal strategy or roadmap presentations quickly without sacrificing quality
Designing marketing or product launch narratives with coherent structure and design
